programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and Baba find Silky admiring some seahorses in a rock pool.
Flynn brags that her special fur keeps her warm, prompting Messy to acquire some for his own benefit.
Olivia feels angry when everyone fights for a turn with her new boat.
Army: On Jack's first day at Bluey's school, Calypso suggests he plays Army outside with Rusty in the bush
Mr Ramirez Secret: After a client shares a secret, Tobias wonders if his dad sacrificed his true dream.
Launch Day Quest: Oswaldo, Leia and Tobias must find a way around a massive line for the new game they want.
On their way to the post office, Dad tells Daniel he can't play at the park, and that makes Daniel mad!
Carbon tries to take a shortcut when helping Oxygen prepare for her teddy bears picnic.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'donkey' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to GrimHQ. Can the Go Jetters fix the glitch?
Cap'n Gail's tall tale of a nine-legged octopus in Lake Swoppiton has everyone panicking. But Mojo and Bo wonder: is the story real, or is Cap'n Gail up to something?
Freezy Town: Winter has arrived in the attic! Nina warns of an endless cold snap, and everyone retreats to their homes.
Cork Invaders: Strange creatures are taking over Attic Town! Everyone is panicking... except Ollie and Titus, who are sure they're just corks.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Foreseeing is Believing: Right after Lex, Plu, Trish, Greg, and Crispy finish watching the season finale of Gunnar the Gumshoe, they get a new customer - a soothsayer called Benedict.
The Baby Sitter: Leanardo is trying to show off his brand new feathers, and becomes jealous when sharing attention with baby Eaglet.
Sleepwalking: The campers are trying to get in the Forest Book of Records, but all of their record breaking attempts are derailed by a sleepwalking Pigeon Post.
Sonia keeps interrupting Hugo as he reads her a book until she learns the importance of waiting for the end. (SL)
Hugo and Sonia learn to take their time while helping to paint a wall. (SL)
Wild Under Bees: Fuzzy Yellow and friends recall the day they first met Buff, their favourite wild beast. (SL)
Oona and Baba find Silky admiring some seahorses in a rock pool.
Flynn brags that her special fur keeps her warm, prompting Messy to acquire some for his own benefit.
Olivia feels angry when everyone fights for a turn with her new boat.
Big Sister Day: Hooper is planning a special surprise party for his big sister Phoebe. The friends ask Hooper if he needs any help, but he wants to do it all by himself.
Henry meets a friendly Digger. There is a house that needs to be built but with the builder off work with a tummy ache it's up to Henry to save the day.
Can-Bots: Stanley is needed for so many jobs he creates 3 special robots - his Can-Bots - to help him.
Sophie Can Do: Sophie's beloved dino-costume has been washed and is drying on the line.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
Bualadh Bos Bubby: Creideann eachtráin go bhfuil bithiúnach réaltra ar bord An Shelby.
Fan... Grúiblín Eile?: Nuair a shábhálann an criú grúiblín eile darb ainm Zaza, bíonn áthas an domhain ar Zuzu - ach go luath mothaíonn sí go bhfuil rud éigin aisteach faoin eachtrán nua seo.
The Lost Voice: Mr Peek loses his voice at a football match and there's a full day of work ahead. How will he tell Jimmy and Violet what to do?
Stonker Honker: Mr. Peek decides Walter the sealion should learn a musical instrument.
Tá Mummy agus Daddy ag cur George ar an bpota.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag spraoi i bpáirc na dtrampailíní.
There's an art exhibition happening today in Tír na nÓg. Oisín goes in search of artistic inspiration.
Sebastian the Kangaroo is like any normal kangaroo but, instead of a pouch, Sebastian carries a large red bag. It's amazing just how much Sebastian has in his bag.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters including Scoopy the Pink Rabbit.
Tallulah has hurt her back preventing her from doing her job.
Mine Mine Mine: Today is Red Berry Day. Red Berry Day involves picking red berries together and sharing them among the group.
Andy And The Darkling Beetle: Andy heads to the Namib desert in Africa to discover how a darkling beetle drinks water
Cap'n Gail's tall tale of a nine-legged octopus in Lake Swoppiton has everyone panicking. But Mojo and Bo wonder: is the story real, or is Cap'n Gail up to something?

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Don't Train On My Parade: When Sir Topham Hatt's springtime parade floral float is destroyed before delivery, Thomas and the engines find the spring in Sodor to save the parade.
Bloop Bloop: There's something fishy about Maddie + Triggs' newest house guest, but they are determined to get to know the new arrival and really figure out what makes him bloop.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Moon Shape: Explorers Hannah, Oliver and Reiann visit Nina in her workshop and discover that light from the sun only shines on one side of the moon.
Mission: Pop-Pop Lost: Search and rescue dog Dan and his owner Jamie set off on an urban search.
Gaoth: Lá gaofar atá ann. Tá MeMo agus BaBa ag baint sult as a bheith ag súgradh le roithleáin. Ag Am Spraoi cuireann siad eiteog ag eitilt sa ghaoth.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
The Puffin family take a fun trip to the underwater cave.
Happy worries that there's going to be a catastrophe in Sunny River.
Fancy Restaurant: The girls set up a romantic dinner for their mum and dad. Everything goes according to plan, until chef Bingo's special arrives.
User OMS 1942: Oswaldo tells his friends that he thinks his life is part of a TV show.
The Whisper: Oswaldo brags about not being afraid of anything and invites Leia and Tobias to watch a new horror movie at his home.
Daniel and his friends are making 'Just Like Me' pictures at school today. When Miss Elaina spills red paint on Daniel's project, he gets mad at his friend.
While tending to his prized pumpkin plant, Nitrogen accidentally causes chaos for the Atoms of Atom Town.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'train' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure!
Grandmaster Glitch makes popcorn in Mount Etna, blocking the volcano and endangering the farms.
It's Mojo versus some very pesky birds on a supersonic pizza delivery run!
Kookoo Guru: Titus laughs at Great Know-it-all's predictions... but when Nina warns that anyone who mocks him might cause trouble.
The Treasure Hunt: Disaster strikes! Ollie has lost one of Bella's picnic props and must find it before her sister notices. To help, she enlists GreenBeard, the expert in lost treasures...

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Chicken and the Eggs: Fur Taxi's latest gig: to deliver a mother hen and her eggs to Dr. Froydus.
The Perfect Present: Doodle's 'hatch day' is approaching. Odo feels the pressure of coming up with the perfect present for his best friend.
Shake a Tail Feather: When Leonardo loses a most prized tail feather, he goes into a melodramatic tailspin of shame.
Sonia finds a shell to throw in the Thanking Fountain and decides to put Granny's needs first. (SL)
Sonia learns to turn something she doesn't like, the sound of thunder, into something that can be a fun game. (SL)
Startle Brush Color: Fuzzy Yellow startles Bao Bao, and Bao Bao turns white. Intrigued, Bao Bao offers to be a canvas for all the friends to paint on. (SL)
Oona and May argue over which one is the fastest and decide to have a race to find out.
The Puffin family take a fun trip to the underwater cave.
Happy worries that there's going to be a catastrophe in Sunny River.
Plom's Big Book Day: To celebrate Pop Paper City's Big Book Day, the friends are all going to read their favourite stories out loud.
Henry meets a friendly Daffodil. He is getting ready to welcome some new plants to the garden when they arrive a day early. Henry becomes a Gardener for the day.
Mermaid: The kids are taking photos for a display at school but Fifi hasn't got hers yet - she needs Stanley's help to get a picture of a Mermaid!
Leaves: It's autumn and there are so many leaves all over the town.
Pre-school animation about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her.
An tSain-Ialtóg: Nuair a chaithfidh an criú ialtóg a thabhairt abhaile, iompaíonn Shelby bun os cionn chun í a dhéanamh compordach - ach cuireann sé seo gach rud trí chéile!
Blobaí: Nuair a thuirlingíonn an criú ar phláinéad mistéireach gorm, faigheann siad amach go bhfuil an pláinéad iomlán beo... agus nach dtaitníonn an criú leis ar chor ar bith!
Making Tracks: On a lovely snowy day at the zoo, the Peeks feed the penguins before a spot of ice-skating.
The Camels Grumpy Day: The camels, Bernard and Nora, are very out of sorts so Mr. Peek calls in Dr. Sue, who diagnoses a bad case of the grumps!
Tá Peppa ag dul chuig an dochtúir dá scrúdú sláinte rialta. Tugann sí leabhar beag dearg léi ina bhfuil gach fás agus forbairt atá déanta go dtí seo aici scríofa ann
Tugann Peppa agus George leo a gcuid scútar agus clár scátála go dtí an pháirc.
Everyone is sharing what their favourite things are. Oisín uses his new camera to take photographs as he searches for his favourite object.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters and focusing iin this episode on Polly the tiger.
Everyone wants cake but no-one wants to help make it. Simon tells the story of The Little Red Hen.
Finders Keepers: Huey and Reggie were wrestling by the seaside when both of them accidentally fell into the sea. Underwater, they discovered a large shell and a glowing pearl.
Andy And The Flying Fox: Andy heads to Australia and embarks on an epic adventure with little red flying foxes.
It's Mojo versus some very pesky birds on a supersonic pizza delivery run!
